name: clawbrowser
description: Browser built for AI agents: run Clawbrowser in Claude Desktop with built-in fingerprint management and transparent proxy routing.
long_description: Bring Clawbrowser into Claude Desktop in one install. Launch a browser built for AI agents with built-in fingerprint management, transparent proxy routing, and standard CDP compatibility. Install the .mcpb, set an optional API key once in extension settings, and keep sessions running on Clawbrowser's browser-managed config for fast, reliable automation.

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Optional bootstrap key from https://app.clawbrowser.ai. Leave it blank if Clawbrowser already has a saved browser-managed config.json.
